---
title: "Roei Yosifof"
image: roei.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image: roei.jpeg
  links:
    #- icon: star
    #  text: Website
    #  href: https://www.ucl.ac.uk/bartlett/casa
    #- icon: bank
    #  text: UCL profile
    #  href: https://www.ucl.ac.uk/bartlett/casa
    #- icon: github
    #  text: GitHub
    #  href: https://www.ucl.ac.uk/bartlett/casa
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/roei-yosifof-6a1471178/
    - icon: google
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=nIlAvv8AAAAJ
---

Roei joined CASA as a first year PhD student in 2025 after previously working as an architect in urban design projects and as part time researcher. He is interested in macro scale urban and regional modeling, machine learning, and basketball.

## Fact File

|                                    |                        |
|------------------------------------|------------------------|
| Good Listener                      | 80                     |
| Personal Hygeine                   | 90                     |
| Advanced Spatial Analysis Quotient | 12                     |
| Shamelessness                      | 10                     |
| Huggability                        | depends on the weather |
| Coding Chops                       | 15                     |
